reference: BMJ 2024 Figure 2-style dashboard redraw from cached public-workbook PSA outputs
source_logic: Read cached England-level Model A--E PSA query outputs from PSA.Data, sum by iteration in Python, and compute a 95% ellipse from the stored cloud.
scientific_limit: The public workbook stores 1,000 cached PSA iterations. The article reports 10,000 simulations. This dashboard reference is not a new parameter-level PSA run.
